claudeResult.resultText:
Done! I've created `./architecture.html` with a 3-tier architecture diagram. It includes:

- Three labeled boxes: "Client", "API", and "Database"
- Arrows connecting them left-to-right using inline SVG
- All styling and graphics self-contained (no external resources)
- Clean centered layout with a white background

You can open it in any browser to view the diagram.
